Sinks.Name: custom-errors
Sinks.Description: Generic crash and error collector. Set Endpoint and Token for an internal gateway or webhook-compatible service.

Sinks.Name: sentry
Sinks.Description: Sentry event ingestion endpoint. Configure Endpoint from the project DSN store endpoint and provide the DSN auth header or key as required by your deployment.

Sinks.Name: google-cloud-error-reporting
Sinks.Description: Google Cloud Error Reporting events.report endpoint. Configure Endpoint with the project path and use either an API key in the URL or an authorization token header.

Sinks.Name: betterstack-heartbeat
Sinks.Description: Better Stack heartbeat URL. The plugin sends periodic GET requests while the node process is running.

Sinks.Name: ops-notifications
Sinks.Description: Webhook-compatible notification channel for node exceptions.
